overview: Men's Health Foundation is a community health clinic in Los Angeles offering primary care and specialized sexual health services to all men. They operate clinics in West Hollywood and South LA in partnership with Southern California Men's Medical Group.
highlights: Rapid Results STI/HIV testing and treatment
Low/no-cost public programs including PrEP/PEP access
targetAudience: All men, particularly LGBTQ+ men and men of color seeking culturally competent healthcare.
